message:
docs: add log explorer section to README

Add documentation for the --explore flag and its features:
- Session browsing grouped by date
- Provider filtering
- Conversation view with thinking/tool call rendering
- Full-text search
- Raw JSON debugging

Also add test coverage for host filtering in handleHome.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,6 +85,22 @@ export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/anthropic/api.anthropic.com
 export OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/openai/api.openai.com
 ```
 
+## Log Explorer
+
+Browse and search your LLM logs with a web UI:
+
+```bash
+llm-proxy --explore              # Opens browser to http://localhost:8080
+llm-proxy --explore --explore-port 9000  # Use specific port
+```
+
+Features:
+- Session list grouped by date with message counts
+- Filter by provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.)
+- Conversation view with thinking blocks and tool calls
+- Full-text search across all logs
+- Raw JSON view for debugging
+
 ## Uninstall
 
 ```bash

@@ -406,3 +406,32 @@ func TestSearchFindsMatchingContent(t *testing.T) {
 		t.Error("Did not expect hello-session in results")
 	}
 }
+
+func TestHomeFiltersByHost(t *testing.T) {
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+
+	// Create sessions for two different hosts
+	dir1 := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "api.anthropic.com", "2026-01-14")
+	dir2 := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "api.openai.com", "2026-01-14")
+	os.MkdirAll(dir1, 0755)
+	os.MkdirAll(dir2, 0755)
+
+	os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir1, "anthropic-session.jsonl"), []byte(`{"type":"session_start"}`), 0644)
+	os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir2, "openai-session.jsonl"), []byte(`{"type":"session_start"}`), 0644)
+
+	explorer := NewExplorer(tmpDir)
+
+	// Request with filter
+	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/?host=api.anthropic.com", nil)
+	w := httptest.NewRecorder()
+
+	explorer.ServeHTTP(w, req)
+
+	body := w.Body.String()
+	if !strings.Contains(body, "anthropic-session") {
+		t.Error("Expected filtered results to include anthropic session")
+	}
+	if strings.Contains(body, "openai-session") {
+		t.Error("Expected filtered results to exclude openai session")
+	}
+}
